titleStmt.title: SII 34.112: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 112. Tiruveṟumbūr, Tiruchirappalli Taluk, Tiruchirappalli District. On the west wall of the central shrine in the Piplikēśvara temple.

summary.p: This records assignment of some land as jīvitam for the maintenance of a watchman. The land was purchased from the ūrār of the Tiruveṟumbiyūr by Vēḷān Vīranāraṇaṉ alias Sembiyaṉ Vēdivēḷāṉ of Chiṟudavūr who had built the central shrine. The document was written by a Kaṇḍaṉ Araiyaṉ a kiḻāṉ of Vaṟaḍāṟṟu-vallam in Veṇbi-nāḍu.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . kOrājakEsari parmmakku yāṇṭu 7 Āvatu kavira nāṭṭuttiruveṟum
piyūr Ūrar Icainta Ūrom Ittiruveṟumpiyūr Āḷvār śrīvimāṉa Eḻuntaru
ḷuvitta kiḷiyūr nāṭṭuc ciṟutuvvūruṭaiyāṉ vēḷāṉ vīranārāyaṇaṉāṉa
cempiyaṉ vēdivēḷāṉiṭai Emmilicainta vilaippo
ruḷ koṇṭu Ittiruveṟumpiyūrāḷvārkut tirumey kāppāka Iḻavu pē
ṟṟukkuriyāṉ Eṅkaḷiloruvaṉai candrādittyavaṟ ṟirumeykāppu Iṭuvatākavum I
ṭṭa tirumeykāppāṉukku jīvitamāka nāṅkaḷ Eṅkaḷūrc ceytu kuṭutta nilat
tukku kīḻpāṟkellai Ittiruveṟumpiyūr devar tēvatāṉattu Ellai varampiṉuk
ku mēkkum teṉpāṟkellai Āṉai nakkaṉum cempiyaṉ teṉkaraināṭu kiḻavaṉu
m kaṇṭaṉampaṉum nakkañcāttaṉum pūtinīlaṉum kaṇṭaṉākaṉum Ūrār nila
ttukku vaṭakkum mēlpāṟkellai karañcaṉakkaṉum Āṉai nakkaṉum nilattukkuk kiḻakku
m vaṭapāṟkellait tirumalaikkut teṟkum Ivvicaitta perunāṉ kellaiyuḷakappa
ṭṭa nilam jīvitamāvatākavum Ipparicu cētu kuṭuttōm tiruveṟumpiyūr Ūrōm Ūrā
rēva Eḻutiṉēṉ veṇpiṉāṭu vaṟaṭāṟṟu vallaṅ kiḻāṉ kaṇṭaṉaraiyaṉēṉ Ivai
yeṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi Iṭṭukkuṭuttē nīla nakkaṉēṉivai yeṉ Eḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi I
ṭṭukuṭuttēṉ kaṇṭanākaṉēṉ Ivai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭikkuṭuttēṉ cātta nampaṉēṉi
vai Eṉṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi Iṭṭukkuṭuttēṉ māṟaṉākaṉē Ivai Eṉeḻuttu Ippaṭi Oṭṭi I
ṭṭuk kuṭuttēṉ tokkaiyamātēvaṉē Ivai
yeḻuttuḥ—
Digital edition of SII 34.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
